case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. TOAN M VU ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR FEB-27-2023 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCT-19-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-27-2023 VACATED. STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED 11/10/22. (206)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210002552) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VU, TOAN M AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-06-2022
